rules.text: Inter-agency or intra-agency memorandums or letters that would not be available by law to a party in litigation with the agency, including the deliberative-process privilege protecting pre-decisional, deliberative material.
Personnel and medical files and similar files the disclosure of which would constitute a clearly unwarranted invasion of personal privacy, weighed against the public interest in disclosure.

Records or information compiled for law-enforcement purposes, to the extent that production could reasonably be expected to constitute an unwarranted invasion of personal privacy, weighed against the public interest in disclosure.
